rationale.ai-review: Adversarial Apollo agent independently verifies milestones; reliability limits shown
rationale.rules-based-checks: Verification anchored to executable tests, CI, deterministic oracles
rationale.remediation-gating: Fail verdicts gate fix rounds; budget-halving bounds autonomous rework
rationale.hitl-workflow: Asynchronous issue-filing oversight, pause/bootstrap reset, tiered intervention model
rationale.framework: Open-source orchestration framework for pipeline-integrated multi-agent development
rationale.built-system: Implemented, deployed 137 hours on four real projects
